title: Don't wait to quit smoking - Canada.ca
content:
## Don't wait to quit smoking
With described video

## Transcript - Don't wait to quit smoking
Words on screen: Most people think they will quit smoking.
A man leans against a building.
Words on screen: one day.
The man takes a cigarette out of a pack. Words appear on colourful backgrounds: Quote: "At some point". Quote: "When the time is right".
Words on screen: 'After they…graduate'. Young people wear caps and gowns.
Words on screen: 'Move out'. A young woman carries a box into an apartment building.
Words on screen: 'Start a new job'. At a construction site, a man adjusts a hardhat.
Words on screen: 'Meet someone'. A couple on a date.
Words on screen: 'Have a child'. Silhouette of a parent holding a baby.
The screen turns black. Words appear: Get sick.
Words on a colourful background: What if you quit smoking today, instead?
The man leaning against the building puts the unlit cigarette back into the pack. He smiles confidently.
Words on screen: Canada.ca/quit-smoking
Government of Canada logo.
